多年来，有很多谣言和流传的笑话说，XDA将(或许应该)制造一部手机。我们在LineageOS(以及之前的CyangenMod)等替代平台上的历史意味着，XDA在帮助开发智能手机上可用的主要平台的可行替代方案方面一直走在前列。
今天，我们非常兴奋地宣布，我们终于做到了--我们制造了一部手机。今年早些时候，我们与F(X)tec合作，讨论如何将替代平台带给更广泛的受众。F(X)tec Pro1-X做到了这一点：它是世界上第一款开箱即用的运行LineageOS的手机，你也可以获得运行Ubuntu Touch操作系统的版本。
CyangenMod-LineageOS的精神始祖-始于XDA社区，从那时起，我们一直在帮助维护、开发和扩展LineageOS支持的设备。可以肯定地说，LineageOS和XDA的历史是密不可分的，我们很高兴能推出第一款开箱即用的运行LineageOS的手机。
我们创建Pro1-X的主要原因是为我们的用户提供选择。推出的每一款手机要么运行Android，要么运行iOS，即使是最好的Android手机也需要Root才能真正定制体验。
现在，不仅仅有两种选择：Pro1-X不仅运行LineageOS；还有运行Ubuntu Touch OS和Android的变种，我们正在积极探索其他平台。
您可能对Pro1-X很熟悉；我们以去年推出的流行的F(X)tec Pro1为例，做了一些关键的调整。RAM和存储空间都增加了-分别从6 GB和128 GB增加到8 GB和256 GB-Pro1-X采用了这种新的探索蓝色，看起来非常棒！
除此之外，Pro1的许多规格都保持不变。有一个66键全QWERTY键盘，可以从显示屏下方滑出，高通骁龙835处理器，双SIM支持，指纹扫描仪，专用相机按钮，USB-C和HDMI输出，等等。还有一个800万像素的前置摄像头，一个1200万像素的主摄像头和一个500万像素的副摄像头。
多年来，我们一直开玩笑说，我们计划制造一款手机。那么我们最终为什么要这么做呢？特别是今年，隐私变得比以往任何时候都重要，LineageOS以让你超越传统Android智能手机的控制而闻名。特别值得一提的是，LineageOS16中的Privacy Guard被LineageOS17中AOSP的权限中心所取代，它只允许您共享您想要共享的数据，而不能共享您不想共享的数据。
我们还看到，在过去的几年里，LineageOS和其他平台在我们社区的受欢迎程度不断提高，人们对这些替代的Android发行版也越来越感兴趣。
除了LineageOS，还有一大群Ubuntu用户一直梦想拥有一部运行Ubuntu Touch的智能手机，而Pro1-X是第一款运行Ubuntu Touch的高通智能手机。不仅如此，我们还设法让HDMI输出功能正常工作，这样你就可以插入HDMI数据线并将其连接到大屏幕上，然后将显示器用作触控板。
制造一部智能手机并不便宜，即使我们在对现有设备进行一些关键升级时也是如此。也就是说，我们已经设法降低了成本，并且对XDA社区有一个特别的价格。
Pro1-X的完整零售价为899美元。但对于XDA社区来说，639美元的价格是有限的，这是29%的折扣！如果你够快的话，我们还有599美元的早起前优惠，可以节省33%！要了解更多详情，请访问Indiegogo众筹页面。您只能使用此页面上的链接访问XDA特价！
我们非常高兴终于发布了XDA手机，我们也很自豪能帮助LineageOS和Ubuntu Touch OS更上一层楼。
note_en:
There have been many rumors and running jokes over the years that XDA would, and probably should, make a phone. Our history with alternative platforms such as  LineageOS (and CyanogenMod that came before it) has meant that XDA has been at the forefront of helping develop viable alternatives to the primary platforms available on smartphones.
 Today, we’re super excited to announce that we’ve finally done it – we’ve made a phone. Earlier this year, we partnered with F(x)tec to discuss how we can bring an alternative platform to a wider audience. The F(x)tec Pro1-X does just this: it’s the world’s first phone to run LineageOS out of the box, and you can also get a version running Ubuntu Touch OS.
    CyanogenMod – the spiritual ancestor to LineageOS – began in the XDA community, and since then, we’ve helped to maintain, develop, and expand the devices that LineageOS supports. It’s safe to say that the  history of LineageOS and XDA are inexorably linked and we’re excited to launch the first phone running LineageOS out of the box.
 The main reason we created the Pro1-X was to offer our users a choice. Every phone launched either runs Android or iOS, and even the  best Android phones require  rooting to be able to truly customize the experience.
 Now, there’s more than just two options: the Pro1-X doesn’t only run LineageOS; there are also variants available running Ubuntu Touch OS and Android, and we’re actively exploring other platforms.
   The Pro1-X might look familiar to you; we took the popular  F(x)tec Pro1 that was launched last year and made a few key tweaks. The RAM and storage have both been increased – from 6GB and 128GB to 8GB and 256GB respectively – and the Pro1-X comes in this new Discovery Blue color that looks fantastic!
 Beyond that, many of the Pro1 specs have remained the same. There’s a 66-key full QWERTY keyboard that slides out from beneath the display, a Qualcomm  Snapdragon 835 processor, Dual SIM support, a fingerprint scanner, a dedicated camera button, USB-C, and HDMI out, and far more. There’s also an 8MP front camera, a 12MP primary camera, and a 5MP secondary camera.
   For years, we’ve teased that we’re planning to create a phone. So why did we finally do it? This year especially, privacy has become more important than ever before, and LineageOS is known for letting you go beyond the controls you’d find on a traditional Android smartphone. In particular, the Privacy Guard – in LineageOS 16, which was replaced by AOSP’s Permissions Hub in LineageOS 17 – allows you to only share the data you want to share, and not share the data you don’t want to share.
 We’ve also seen that the popularity of LineageOS and other platforms across our community has grown over the past few years and there’s more interest in these alternative Android distributions.
 Beyond just LineageOS, there’s a large community of Ubuntu users who’ve always dreamed of having a smartphone running Ubuntu Touch, and the Pro1-X is the first Qualcomm-powered smartphone to run Ubuntu Touch. Not only that, we’ve also managed to get the HDMI-out feature working, so you can plug an HDMI cable in and connect it to a big screen, and use the display as a trackpad.
   Building a smartphone isn’t cheap, even when we’re adapting an existing device with some key upgrades. That said, we’ve managed to keep our costs down and there’s a special price for the XDA community.
 The full retail price of the Pro1-X is $899. But for the XDA community, there are a limited number of devices available at $639, which is 29% off! If you’re fast enough, we also have a pre-early bird offer for $599, which is a saving of 33%!! To find out more details, head over to our  Indiegogo crowdfunding page. You can only access the special XDA price using the link on this page!
 We’re super excited to finally launch the XDA phone, and we’re proud to be helping elevate LineageOS and Ubuntu Touch OS to the next level.
title: 由XDA推出Pro1 X：官方LineageOS Android手机
title_en: Introducing Pro1 X: Official LineageOS Android Phone by XDA

哈勃太空望远镜的一项新研究比以往任何时候都更清晰地揭示了我们所知的最耐人寻味和最有价值的小行星之一。
在距离地球约2.3亿英里/3.7亿公里的地方，俗称的普赛克是太阳系主要小行星带中质量最大的天体之一，其轨道位于火星和木星之间。
它大约140英里/226公里宽，与大多数岩石或冰冷的小行星不同，普赛克似乎是金属的。
事实上，它是如此稠密和金属，以至于普赛克被认为是一颗在形成过程中失败的行星的剩馀核心--一颗“原行星”。
德克萨斯州圣安东尼奥西南研究所(Southwest Research Institute)的行星科学家特雷西·贝克尔博士(Dr.Tracy Becker)本周在《行星科学杂志》上发表了这篇新论文，他说，“我们已经看到过以金属为主的陨石，但普塞克可能是独一无二的，因为它可能是一颗完全由铁和镍组成的小行星。”贝克尔博士是本周发表在“行星科学杂志”上的一篇新论文的作者。
铁和镍经常存在于金属陨石和行星致密的金属核心中。贝克尔说：“地球有一个金属核、一个地幔和一个地壳。”
一些人认为，组成普赛克的金属可能价值约10000万亿美元。2019年全球经济价值约142万亿美元。
贝克尔说：“有可能在灵魂原行星形成时，它被太阳系中的另一个物体撞击，失去了地幔和地壳。”
贝克尔的研究让哈勃太空望远镜在小行星自转过程中的两个特定点观察小行星，以观察心灵的两侧。它还在紫外光波长下观察了这颗小行星，以尽可能多地了解其表面的细节。贝克尔说：“我们第一次能够在任何小行星上识别出我们认为是氧化铁的紫外线吸收带。”“这表明小行星正在发生氧化，这可能是太阳风撞击表面的结果。”
太阳风是来自太阳更热的外层大气的带电粒子流，称为日冕。通常被称为“太空天气”，这也是造成地球极光的原因，在普赛克也可能造成过度的“太空风化”。
贝克尔发现，小行星表面可能大部分是纯铁，但他指出，即使是少量铁的存在也可能主导紫外线观测，实际上，表面可能只有10%是真正的铁。
然而，在观测普赛克时，这颗小行星在更深的紫外光波长上的反射率似乎越来越高。贝克尔说：“这是我们需要进一步研究的问题。”“这可能表明它在太空中暴露了这么长时间。这种类型的紫外线增亮通常被归因于太空风化。“。
然而，贝克尔的论文非常清楚地表明，虽然很难量化普赛克表面可能存在的铁的数量，但它是一个独特的物体，所以科学家无法将它与其他任何物体进行比较。
我们要想近距离观察行星核心的真实面貌，唯一的办法就是造访普赛克。这正是美国国家航空航天局(NASA)正在计划做的事情。
由于将于2022年8月从佛罗里达州肯尼迪航天中心搭载SpaceX猎鹰重型火箭发射，NASA的SPECE任务是其低成本机器人太空任务发现计划的一部分。
轨道飞行器定于2026年1月抵达普塞克，开始至少21个月的轨道测绘和研究小行星的属性。
贝克尔说：“了解行星的真正组成，并潜在地看到行星的内部是令人着迷的。”贝克尔将普赛克和其他小行星描述为太阳系的基石。“一旦我们到达普赛克，我们真的会理解是否真的是这样，即使结果并不像我们预期的那样……。任何时候有惊喜，都是令人兴奋的。“。

note_en:
A new study by the Hubble Space Telescope has revealed a clearer picture than ever before of one of the most intriguing and  most valuable asteroids we know of.
        About 230 million miles/370 million kilometers from Earth, Psyche—as it’s commonly known—is one of the most massive objects in the Solar System’s main asteroid belt orbiting between Mars and Jupiter.
    It’s about 140 miles/226 kilometers-wide and—unlike most asteroids, which are rocky or icy—Psyche appears to be metallic.
  In fact, it’s so dense and metallic that Psyche is thought to be the leftover core of a planet that failed during its formation—a “protoplanet.”
     “We’ve seen meteorites that are mostly metal, but Psyche could be unique in that it might be an asteroid that is totally made of iron and nickel,” said Dr. Tracy Becker, a planetary scientist at the Southwest Research Institute in in San Antonio, Texas, and author of the new paper  published in the  Planetary Science Journal this week.
    Iron and nickel are often found in metallic meteorites and in the dense metal cores of planets. “Earth has a metal core, a mantle and crust,” said Becker.
      Some think that the metals that comprise Psyche could make be worth about  $10,000 quadrillion. The global economy was worth about  $142 trillion in 2019.
    “It’s possible that as a Psyche protoplanet was forming, it was struck by an-other object in our solar system and lost its mantle and crust,” said Becker.
      Becker’s study had the Hubble Space Telescope observe the asteroid at two specific points in its rotation to view both sides of Psyche. It also viewed the asteroid in ultraviolet wavelengths of light to get as much detail as possible of its surface. “We were able to identify for the first time on any asteroid what we think are iron oxide ultraviolet absorption bands,” said Becker. “This is an indication that oxidation is happening on the asteroid, which could be a result of the solar wind hitting the surface.”
  The solar wind is a stream of charged particles from the Sun’s hotter outer atmosphere called its  corona. Often called “space weather,” it’s also what causes aurora at Earth and could, at Psyche have caused excessive “space weathering.”
    Becker saw that the asteroid’s surface could be mostly pure iron, though noted that the presence of even a small amount of iron could dominate ultraviolet observations, and in practice it could just be that 10% of the surface is actual iron.
  However, while observing Psyche, the asteroid appeared increasingly reflective at deeper UV wavelengths. “This is something that we need to study further,” said Becker. “This could be indicative of it being exposed in space for so long. This type of UV brightening is often attributed to space weathering.”
  However, what Becker’s paper makes very clear is that while it’s tricky to quantify the amount of iron that may be present on the surface of Psyche, it’s a unique object so scientists cannot compare it with anything else.
      The only way we’ll ever get to see a close-up what the core of a planet is really like is to pay a visit to Psyche. That’s exactly what NASA is planning to do.
  Due to launch in August 2022 from Florida’s Kennedy Space Center atop a SpaceX Falcon Heavy rocket, NASA’s Psyche mission is part of its Discovery Program of low-cost robotic space missions.
  The orbiter is due to arrive at Psyche in January 2026 to begin at least 21 months in orbit mapping and studying the asteroid’s properties.
  “To understand what really makes up a planet and to potentially see the inside of a planet is fascinating,” said Becker, who describes Psyche and other asteroids as the building blocks of the Solar System. “Once we get to Psyche, we’re really going to understand if that’s the case, even if it doesn’t turn out as we expect ... any time there’s a surprise, it’s always exciting.”
 Follow me on  Twitter or  LinkedIn.  Check out my  website or some of my other work  here.
title: 哈勃：价值远远超过我们全球经济的金属小行星
title_en: Hubble: Metal Asteroid That’s Worth Way More Than Our Global Economy

美国联邦调查局(FBI)发布闪电警报，警告黑客通过暴露在互联网上且不安全的SonarQube实例窃取美国政府机构和企业组织的数据。
SonarQube是一个开源平台，用于自动代码质量审计和静态分析，以发现使用27种编程语言的项目中的错误和安全漏洞。
自2020年4月以来，易受攻击的SonarQube服务器一直被攻击者积极利用，以获取政府和企业实体拥有的数据源代码存储库的访问权限，后来又将其渗透并公开泄露。
联邦调查局表示，自攻击开始以来，他们已经确认了几起此类事件，攻击者滥用了SonarQube配置漏洞。
从2020年4月开始，FBI观察到与不安全的SonarQube实例有关的源代码泄露，这些实例来自美国政府机构和美国私营公司，涉及科技、金融、零售、食品、电子商务和制造业，FBI在TLP：白色闪光警报中表示。
尽管联邦调查局没有指出此类攻击的公开报道，但BleepingComputer在7月份报告了数十家公司的源代码被盗并在网上泄露的事件。
开发人员和反向工程师Tillie Kottmann收集了50多家公司的泄露代码，并将其发布到GitLab公共存储库中，这些公司包括微软、Adobe、联想、AMD、高通、摩托罗拉、HiSilicon(华为所有)、联发科、GE电器、任天堂、Roblox、迪士尼等。
Kottmann说，目前有数以千计的公司因为未能正确保护他们的SonarQube安装而暴露了专有源代码。
Kottmann还在8月份泄露了大约20 GB的英特尔机密文件，此前他从一位匿名消息来源那里收到了这些文件，该消息来源早些时候涉嫌侵入了英特尔的服务器。
该公司后来告诉BedepingComputer，这些信息似乎来自英特尔资源与设计中心，该中心托管着信息，供我们的客户、合作伙伴和其他已注册访问的外部方使用。
FBI解释说，威胁行为者首先使用默认端口号(即9000)扫描暴露在互联网上的SonarQube实例，从而开始攻击。
发现暴露的服务器后，他们会尝试使用默认管理员/管理员凭据访问易受攻击的实例。
虽然没有点名，但FBI在闪电警报中强调了两起这样的事件，一起是由一名确认身份的演员实施的，另一起袭击者仍不清楚：
·2020年7月，一名身份明确的网络参与者通过安全性不佳的SonarQube实例从企业中渗出了专有源代码，并将渗出的源代码发布在一个自托管的公共存储库上。
·2020年8月，不明威胁行为者通过公共生命周期存储库工具泄露了两个组织的内部数据。被盗数据来自SonarQube实例，这些实例使用在受影响组织的网络上运行的默认端口设置和管理员凭据。
·更改SonarQube默认设置，包括更改默认管理员用户名、密码和端口(9000)。·将SonarQube实例放在登录屏幕后面，检查是否有未经授权的用户访问该实例。·如果可行，撤销对SonarQube实例中公开的任何应用程序编程接口键或其他凭据的访问权限。·将SonarQube实例配置为位于您组织的防火墙和其他外围防御之后，以防止未经身份验证的访问。
note_en:
The Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) issued a flash alert warning of hackers stealing data from U.S. government agencies and enterprise organizations via internet-exposed and insecure SonarQube instances.
 SonarQube is an open-source platform for automated code quality auditing and static analysis to discover bugs and security vulnerabilities in projects using 27 programming languages.
 Vulnerable SonarQube servers have been actively exploited by attackers since April 2020 to gain access to data source code repositories owned by both government and corporate entities, later exfiltrating it and leaking it publicly.
  The FBI says that it has identified several such incidents where the attackers have abused SonarQube configuration vulnerabilities since the attacks have started.
 "Beginning in April 2020, the FBI observed source code leaks associated with insecure SonarQube instances from US government agencies and private US companies in the technology, finance, retail, food, eCommerce, and manufacturing sectors," the FBI says in the  TLP:WHITE flash alert.
 Even though the FBI doesn't point to public reporting of such attacks, BleepingComputer reported in July of dozens of companies having their  source code stolen and leaked online.
 Developer and reverse engineer  Tillie Kottmann collected and published the leaked code of over 50 companies including Microsoft, Adobe, Lenovo, AMD, Qualcomm, Motorola, Hisilicon (owned by Huawei), Mediatek, GE Appliances, Nintendo, Roblox, Disney, and more in a public GitLab repository.
 Kottmann said at the moment that there are thousands of companies that expose proprietary source code by failing to properly secure their SonarQube installations.
 Kottmann also leaked  roughly 20 GB of Intel confidential documents during August, after receiving them from an anonymous source who allegedly breached the company's servers earlier.
 The company later told BleepingComputer that the "information appears to come from the Intel Resource and Design Center, which hosts information for use by our customers, partners and other external parties who have registered for access."
  The threat actors start their attacks by first scanning for Internet-exposed SonarQube instances using the default port number (i.e., 9000) the FBI explains.
 After discovering an exposed server, they attempt to gain access to vulnerable instances using default admin/admin credentials.
 While not naming any names, the FBI highlights two such events in the flash alert, one conducted by an identified actor and one where the attackers are still unknown:
 •  I n July 2020, an identified cyber actor exfiltrated proprietary source code from enterprises through poorly secured SonarQube instances and published the exfiltrated source code on a self-hosted public repository.
 •  In August 2020, unknown threat actors leaked internal data from two organizations through a public lifecycle repository tool. The stolen data was sourced from SonarQube instances that used default port settings and admin credentials running on the affected organizations’ networks.
  • Change the SonarQube default settings, including changing default administrator username, password, and port (9000). • Place SonarQube instances behind a login screen, and check if unauthorized users have accessed the instance. • Revoke access to any application programming interface keys or other credentials that were exposed in a SonarQube instance, if feasible. • Configure SonarQube instances to sit behind your organization’s firewall and other perimeter defenses to prevent unauthenticated access.
title: FBI：黑客通过SonarQube实例窃取政府源代码
title_en: FBI: Hackers stole government source code via SonarQube instances

note:
近年来，音乐行业加强了对盗流工具和服务的执法行动。
RIAA和其他音乐团体已经提起诉讼，发出停止和停止令，并发布了无数DMCA下架通知。
直到最近，这些努力几乎没有引起广大公众的注意，但上周晚些时候，情况发生了变化。当RIAA瞄准非常流行的开源工具YouTube-DL时，许多人愤怒地回应。
上周五，RIAA要求开发者平台GitHub删除YouTube-DL代码和各种分支，因为据称它违反了DMCA的反规避条款。
据称，通过允许公众从YouTube下载内容，该工具绕过了YouTube的“滚动密码”保护。不仅如此，该代码还包含了到受版权保护作品的链接，以说明其用途。
在我们最初的报道之后，我们了解到针对YouTube-DL的压力早在几周前就已经在德国开始了。与几家主要音乐行业公司合作的Rasch律师事务所发出了停止和停止令，希望让YouTube-DL下线。
托管服务Uberspace是接收者之一。该公司拥有YouTube-DL官方网站，至今仍在这么做。Uberspace没有关闭网站，而是通过自己的律师回复了通知，律师表示，托管公司没有任何不当之处。
该公司告诉我们，当停止和停止通知提交时，yt-dl.org甚至没有托管该工具，因为所有的下载链接都指向GitHub。
Uberspace的乔纳斯说：“无论如何，软件本身并没有托管在我们的系统上，所以，老实说，我觉得不管怎样，让我们卷入这个问题是相当荒谬的-一个专门研究IT法律的律师应该知道得更清楚。”
宿主并不是唯一的目标实体。这家德国律师事务所还向之前维护YouTube-DL存储库的开发商菲利普·哈格迈斯特(Philipp Hagemeister)发出了停止通知。他还否认了这些指控。
哈格迈斯特告诉TorrentFreak：“他们不理解我不再是一名维护者，基本上声称youtube-dl是一个非法企业，而不是一个合法的开源项目，并且误解了很多其他的技术问题。”
Uberspace和Hagemeister都不想透露太多细节，因为这是一个悬而未决的法律问题。然而，两家公司都为自己与YouTube-DL有关的行为进行了辩护。正如我们本周末了解到的那样，他们并不是唯一被执法行动惹恼的人。
在RIAA通知使YouTube-DL离线后不久，许多开发者公开表示抗议。他们认为，音乐行业组织做得太过分了，开始到处重新发布代码的副本。
在过去的几天里，我们看到数以百计的新叉子和复制品出现在网上。这些也被发布到GitHub上，在那里YouTube-DL分叉仍然很容易找到并继续上传。
代码还被张贴在一些意想不到的地方。例如，GitHub的DMCA通知存储库中仍然有一份副本，一些人觉得这很有趣。并且拉请求列表本身可以非常有趣。
我们看到的最有创意的回复之一是@GalacticFurball在Twitter上发布的，他把YouTube-DL编码成可以很容易分享的图片，鼓励其他人也分享这些图片。
“我还建议你保存并重新发布这些图片，因为一个单一的来源有点违背了这一点。”或许可以掀起一股标签风潮之类的。创作歌曲和诗歌。把这些数据发布出去。“。
这激发了更多的创造力，人们找到了在线共享代码的替代方式，所有这些都是为了应对RIAA的下架请求。
与此同时，GitHub的首席执行官纳特·弗里德曼也没有坐以待毙。虽然微软旗下的开发者平台不得不对下架通知做出回应，但弗里德曼本人积极联系YouTube-DL的开发者，帮助他们恢复项目。
这位首席执行官加入了YouTube-DL的IRC频道，希望与存储库的所有者联系，这样他就可以帮助它解除暂停。
“GitHub的存在是为了帮助开发人员。我们从来不想干涉他们的工作。弗里德曼在解释自己的行动时告诉TorrentFreak：“我们希望帮助YouTube-dl的维护者挫败DMCA的指控，这样我们就可以恢复回购。”
很明显，GitHub的存在是为了帮助开发人员。尽管如此，该公司的首席执行官跳出来亲自帮助某人回应DMCA的索赔，这是相当史无前例的。事实证明，RIAA的通知也激怒了弗里德曼。
“也许是因为像youtube-dl这样的工具对档案工作者的重要性，以及我们相关的档案项目和互联网档案馆的资金：我们正在考虑GitHub如何在未来更多的DMCA案件中积极帮助开发人员，并在改革/废除1201方面发挥更积极的作用。”
GitHub的首席执行官表示，YouTube-DL将不会恢复原来的形式。但是，该软件可能能够在没有滚动密码规避代码和如何下载受版权保护的材料的示例的情况下返回。
到目前为止，很明显，RIAA的拆除通知产生了严重的适得其反的效果。随着“史翠珊效应”(Streisand Effect)的全面展开，YouTube-DL的在线拷贝数量可能比以往任何时候都多。
然而，还有更多。弗里德曼的言外之意表明，目前的DMCA规则在某些情况下可能过于严厉。例如，像YouTube-DL这样的工具没有侵权用途，规避版权保护也有好处。例如，存档内容。
这个问题可能最终会成为一个政策问题。每隔四年，美国版权局就会给予DMCA第1201条反规避规则新的豁免，如果这些工具在未来被提上议程，也不会令人惊讶。
RIAA不是简单地关闭YouTube-DL，而是实际上戳到了熊，并增加了对这类工具的支持。不仅来自国内的开发者，也来自GitHub这样的大公司。把那只猫放回袋子里不是一件容易的事。
note_en:
The music industry has increased its enforcement actions against stream-ripping tools and services in recent years.
 The RIAA and other music groups have filed lawsuits, sent cease and desist orders, and issued numerous DMCA takedown notices.
  Until recently these efforts were hardly noticed by the public at large but late last week something changed. When the  RIAA targeted the very popular open-source tool YouTube-DL, many people responded in anger.
 Last Friday the RIAA asked the developer platform GitHub to remove the YouTube-DL code and various forks because it allegedly violates the DMCA’s anti-circumvention provisions.
 By enabling the public to download content from YouTube, the tool allegedly bypasses YouTube ‘rolling cipher’ protection. Not just that, the code also included links to copyrighted works to illustrate its use.
  Following our initial coverage, we learned that the pressure against YouTube-DL had already started weeks earlier in Germany. Law firm Rasch, which works with several major music industry players, sent out cease and desist orders in the hope of taking YouTube-DL offline.
 Hosting service  Uberspace was one of the recipients. The company hosts the official YouTube-DL site and still does so today. Instead of taking the website down, Uberspace replied to the notice through its own lawyer, who said that the hosting company hasn’t don’t anything wrong.
 When the cease and desist notice was filed,  yt-dl.org wasn’t even hosting the tool, as all download links pointed to GitHub, the company informs us.
 “The software itself wasn’t hosted on our systems anyway so, to be honest, I felt it to be quite ridiculous to involve us in this issue anyway – a lawyer specializing in IT laws should know better,” Jonas from Uberspace says.
  The host wasn’t the only entity to be targeted. The German law firm  also sent a cease and desist notice to developer Philipp Hagemeister who previously maintained the YouTube-DL repository. He also denies the accusations.
 “They did not understand that I was no longer a maintainer, basically alleged that youtube-dl was an illegal enterprise rather than a legit open-source project, and misunderstood a bunch of other technical stuff,” Hagemeister tells TorrentFreak.
 Both Uberspace and Hagemeister don’t want to go into too much detail as this is a pending legal issue. However, both defend their actions in relation to YouTube-DL. And they’re not the only ones who were ticked off by the enforcement actions, as we learned this weekend.
  Soon after the RIAA notice took YouTube-DL offline many developers spoke out in protest. They believe that the music industry group went too far and started to republish copies of the code everywhere.
 Over the past several days, we have seen hundreds of new forks and copies appear online. These were also  posted to GitHub, where YouTube-DL forks remain easy to find and continue to be uploaded.
 The code was also posted in some places one wouldn’t expect. For example,  there’s still a copy in GitHub’s DMCA notice repository, which some people find quite amusing. And the list of  pull requests can be quite  entertaining in themselves.
 One of the most creative responses we’ve seen was posted to Twitter by  @GalacticFurball who encoded YouTube-DL into images that can be easily shared, encouraging others to share these as well.
 “I would also suggest that you save and repost the images, as one single source kind of defeats the point. Maybe start a hashtag trend or something. Make songs, and poetry. Get that data out there.”
  This triggered even more creativity, with people finding alternative means to share the code online, all to counter the RIAA’s takedown request.
  Meanwhile, GitHub’s CEO Nat Friedman wasn’t sitting still either. While the Microsoft-owned developer platform had to respond to the takedown notice, Friedman himself actively reached out to YouTube-DL’s developers to help them get their project reinstated.
 The CEO  joined YouTube-DL’s IRC channel hoping to connect with the owner of the repository so he can help to get it unsuspended.
 “GitHub exists to help developers. We never want to interfere with their work. We want to help the youtube-dl maintainers defeat the DMCA claim so that we can restore the repo,” Friedman told TorrentFreak, explaining his actions.
 It’s clear that GitHub exists to help developers. That said, for the company’s CEO to jump in and personally help someone to respond to a DMCA claim, is quite unprecedented. As it turns out, the RIAA’s notice ticked off Friedman as well.
  “Perhaps because of the importance of tools like youtube-dl for archivists, and our related  archive program and funding of the Internet Archive: We are thinking about how GitHub can proactively help developers in more DMCA cases going forward, and take a more active role in reforming/repealing 1201.”
 GitHub’s CEO suggested that YouTube-DL won’t be reinstated in its original form. But, the software may be able to return without the rolling cipher circumvention code and the examples of how to download copyrighted material.
  By now it is clear that the RIAA’s takedown notice backfired badly. With the ‘Streisand Effect’ in full swing, there are now probably more copies of YouTube-DL online than there ever were.
 However, there is more. Reading between the lines Friedman suggests that the current DMCA rules may be too strong in some cases. For example, tools like YouTube-DL have non-infringing uses, and there can be upsides to circumventing copy protections as well. To archive content, for example.
 This issue may eventually become a policy question. Every four years the US Copyright Office grants new exemptions to the DMCA section 1201 anti-circumvention rules, and it wouldn’t surprise if these tools are put on the agenda in the future.
 Instead of simply taking down YouTube-DL, the RIAA may have actually poked the bear and increased support for such tools. Not only from developers at home, but also from big players such as GitHub. Putting that cat back in the bag is not going to be easy.
title: RIAA的YouTube-DL Takedown抨击开发商和GitHub的首席执行官
title_en: RIAA’s YouTube-DL Takedown Ticks Off Developers and GitHub’s CEO

周二，一个政府特别工作组建议，成年人应该在45岁时开始例行的结直肠癌筛查，而不是等到50岁，此举反映了年轻人结肠癌和直肠癌数量的急剧上升。
美国预防服务特别工作组的提案仍需最终敲定。它关于筛查和预防性护理服务的指导方针得到了医生、保险公司和政策制定者的遵循。
美国癌症协会(American Cancer Society)的一项研究显示，尽管绝大多数结直肠癌仍在50岁及以上的人群中发现，但在今年将诊断的147,950例结直肠癌(约1.8万例)中，12%将在50岁以下的成年人中发现。对于1890年至1950年出生的人来说，结直肠癌的发病率稳步下降，但自21世纪中叶以来，每一代人的结直肠癌发病率都在上升。
许多早发性癌症是在20多岁和30多岁的年轻人中诊断出来的，这些人将不在建议草案的覆盖范围内。例如，曾主演“黑豹”和其他电影的演员查德威克·博斯曼(Chadwick Boseman)在8月份死于几年前诊断出的结肠癌，享年43岁。尽管如此，癌症患者的倡导者称赞特别工作组的提议是向前迈出的重要一步，称它有可能拯救数万人的生命。
该小组强调，医疗保健提供者应该特别鼓励黑人男性和女性在45岁时进行筛查，因为在非裔美国人社区中，这种疾病的发病率很高，死亡率也更高。
倡导团体结直肠癌联盟(Colorecast Cancer Alliance)首席执行官迈克尔·萨皮恩扎(Michael Sapienza)说，“对于结直肠癌患者和幸存者来说，这可能是过去一二十年来我记忆中最好的消息。”他说：“我们为此奋斗了很久。这对我们的社区来说是一个巨大的胜利，对结直肠癌社区和癌症护理来说也是一个巨大的里程碑。“。
治疗癌症患者的医生也称赞了这一建议，称它将引起人们对早发性结肠癌和直肠癌的关注，并鼓励初级保健医生和年轻人注意直肠出血和肠道运动变化等警告信号。该小组上一次更新建议是在2016年，当时拒绝降低筛查年龄。
波士顿Dana-Farber研究所青年大肠癌中心主任Kimmie Ng博士说：“生命将被拯救。”我们将预防年轻人的癌症，在他们更有可能治愈的早期阶段发现他们，并有望提高存活率。“
休斯敦M.D.Anderson癌症中心的胃肠内科肿瘤学家Scott Kopetz博士对此表示赞同。他说：“我们现在看到的患者中，有三分之一的人年龄在50岁以下。”“这是个大问题。”
然而，一些批评人士表示，建议草案早就应该出台，而且远远落后于显示年轻人结直肠癌发病率上升的数据。2018年，美国癌症协会(American Cancer Society)建议从45岁开始常规筛查，此前该协会的研究人员报告称，在20多岁和30多岁的成年人中，这种疾病的发病率急剧上升，包括直肠癌的发病率尤其急剧上升。
现年54岁的吉姆·诺恩(Jim Nauen)来自马萨诸塞州牛顿市，在医生敦促他在50岁之前做结肠镜检查后，他在49岁时得知自己患有3期直肠癌。他说，他只经历了轻微的症状，但手术发现了一个棒球大小的肿瘤。
诺恩说，“如果我在45岁时接受筛查，没有人能具体说出来，但很可能只是一个息肉被电击，我们都会继续前进，或者可能是一期癌症。”他说，“如果我在45岁的时候接受筛查，那很可能只是一个息肉，我们都会继续做下去，或者可能是一期癌症。”相反，他忍受了三次手术，化疗和放疗。
年轻的患者说，他们的抱怨经常被医生驳回。根据结直肠癌联盟的一份报告，在接受调查的患有结直肠癌的年轻人中，81%的人表示，在得到诊断之前，他们至少经历了三种癌症症状，而超过一半的人被误诊，并被告知自己患有痔疮、贫血、肠易激综合征，甚至精神健康问题。
47岁的金·纽科默(Kim Newcomer)是该联盟“永不太年轻”(Never Too Young)项目的负责人。她说，她在35岁时得知自己患有晚期直肠癌，但不得不努力接受结肠镜检查，医生一度告诉她，她患有“女性歇斯底里”。她说，这项建议是“朝着正确方向迈出的一步，但总有更多的事情要做。”
特别工作组的建议建立在科学证据的基础上，弗吉尼亚联邦大学(Virginia Federal University)的家庭医生、特别小组主席亚历克斯·克里斯特(Alex Krist)博士表示，对证据的审查表明，对45岁至75岁的成年人进行筛查将产生最大的好处，而不是对年轻人进行筛查。
“现在45岁的人患结肠癌的风险与过去50岁的人是一样的，”克里斯特博士说。
由卫生与公众服务部任命的独立专家小组-特别工作组的建议是一份提案草案。下一步是专家小组将草案张贴供审查，征求公众意见四周，然后制定最终建议。尽管为其指导分配字母等级的专家小组将新建议的评级定为“B”，这意味着福利有很高或中等的确定性，但一旦建议获得批准，大多数私人保险计划必须完全覆盖获得“A”级或“B”级的服务，而不会为患者支付自付费用。(对于76岁至85岁的人群，专家小组没有改变其建议，即患者与护理提供者讨论筛查的风险和好处。)。
尽管人们在想到结肠癌筛查时往往会想到结肠镜检查，但特别工作组建议选择直接的可视化测试，如结肠镜检查，以及可以根据粪便样本识别癌症迹象的测试。基于粪便的测试是非侵入性的，可以在家里进行，但必须更频繁地进行。结肠镜检查是有一定风险的侵入性检查，但可以每10年做一次。
对于特别工作组来说，加强筛查的建议是一种反常现象，他们在十多年前就取消了对一些女性生殖癌的筛查。2009年，该小组表示，女性应该将第一次巴氏涂片推迟到21岁，而且筛查的频率应该比过去更低。同年，该小组建议女性在50岁而不是40岁开始常规乳房X光检查，并每隔一年进行一次，而不是每年一次。
note_en:
Adults should  start screening for colorectal cancer routinely at the age of 45, instead of waiting until 50, a government task force recommended on Tuesday, in a move that reflected the sharp rise in the number of colon and rectal cancers in young adults.
 The proposal by the U.S. Preventive Services Task Force still must be finalized. Its guidance on screenings and preventive care services is followed by doctors, insurance companies and policymakers.
 Though the vast majority of colorectal cancers are still found in those 50 and older, 12 percent of the 147,950 colorectal cancers that will be diagnosed this year — some 18,000 cases — will be found in adults under 50, according to an American Cancer Society study. The incidence of colorectal cancer, which dropped steadily for people born from 1890 to 1950, has been increasing for every generation born since the mid-21st century.
 Many early-onset cancers are diagnosed in people as young as their 20s and 30s who will not be covered by the draft recommendation. For example,  Chadwick Boseman, the actor who starred in “Black Panther” and other films, died in August at 43 from colon cancer that was diagnosed several years earlier. Still, advocates for people with cancer hailed the proposal by the task force as a major step forward, saying it has the potential to save tens of thousands of lives.
 The panel emphasized that health care providers should especially encourage Black men and women to be screened at 45, because of high rates of the disease and higher death rates in African-American communities.
 “This is probably the best news for patients and survivors of colorectal cancer that I can remember over the last 10 or 20 years,” said Michael Sapienza, chief executive of the Colorectal Cancer Alliance, an advocacy group. “We have been fighting for so long for this. It is a huge win for our community, and a huge milestone for the colorectal cancer community and for cancer care.”
 Doctors who treat cancer patients praised the recommendation as well, saying it would draw attention to concerns about early-onset colon and rectal cancer, and encourage both primary care physicians and young adults to heed warning signs like rectal bleeding and changes in bowel movements. The panel declined to lower the screening age when it last updated its recommendation in 2016.
 “Lives will be saved,” said Dr. Kimmie Ng, director of the Young-Onset Colorectal Cancer Center at the Dana-Farber Institute in Boston. “We will be preventing cancers in young people, catching them at an earlier stage when they are more likely to be curable, and hopefully improving survival rates.”
 Dr. Scott Kopetz, a gastrointestinal medical oncologist at M.D. Anderson Cancer Center in Houston, agreed. “One in three of our patients now that we’re seeing are under 50,” he said. “It’s a major issue.”
 Some critics, however, said the draft recommendation was long overdue, and has lagged far behind data showing an uptick in colorectal cancers in younger adults. The American Cancer Society in 2018  recommended starting routine screening at 45, after its own researchers reported a sharp rise in the disease among adults as young as their 20s and 30s, including a particularly sharp rise in rectal cancers.
 Jim Nauen, 54, of Newton, Mass., learned he had Stage 3 rectal cancer when he was 49 after his doctor urged him to get a jump on a colonoscopy before he turned 50. He had been experiencing only mild symptoms, he said, but the procedure detected a tumor the size of a baseball.
 “If I’d been screened at 45, no one can specifically say, but it may well have just been a polyp that would have been zapped and we’d all have gone along our way, or perhaps a Stage 1 cancer,” Mr. Nauen said. Instead, he endured three surgeries, chemotherapy and radiation.
  Younger patients say their complaints are often dismissed by doctors. According to a report by the Colorectal Cancer Alliance, 81 percent of young adults with colorectal cancer surveyed said they  experienced at least three symptoms of cancer before they got a diagnosis, while more than half were misdiagnosed, and told they had hemorrhoids, anemia, irritable bowel syndrome or even mental health problems.
 Kim Newcomer, 47, who manages the Never Too Young program for the alliance, said she learned she had advanced rectal cancer at 35, but had to fight to get a colonoscopy, and was told by a doctor at one point that she had “female hysteria.” She said the recommendation is “a step forward in the right direction, but there is always more to do.”
 The task force bases its recommendation on scientific evidence, and Dr. Alex Krist, a family physician at Virginia Commonwealth University who is chair of the task panel, said a review of the evidence indicated the greatest benefits would accrue from screening adults aged 45 to 75, not younger adults.
 “The risk of getting colon cancer for a 45-year-old today is the same as for a 50-year-old in the past,” Dr. Krist said.
 The recommendation by the task force, an independent group of experts appointed by the Department of Health and Human Services, is a draft proposal. The next step is for the panel to post the draft for review, seeking public comment for a period of four weeks, and then develop the final recommendation. Although the panel, which assigns letter grades to its guidance, has assigned the new recommendation a “B,” meaning there is a high or moderate certainty of benefit, most private insurance plans must fully cover the services that receive either an “A” or “B” grade, with no co-pay for patients, once the recommendation is approved. (For people aged 76 to 85, the panel has not changed it recommendation for patients to discuss the risks and benefits of screening with their care provider.)
 Though people often think of a colonoscopy when they think of colon cancer screening, the task force has recommended the choice of direct visualization tests such as colonoscopies as well as tests that can identify signs of cancer based on stool samples. The stool-based tests are noninvasive and can be done at home, but must be done more frequently. Colonoscopies are invasive tests that carry some risks, but can be done every 10 years.
 The recommendation for stepped up screenings is an anomaly for the task force, which rolled back screenings for some women’s reproductive cancers over a decade ago. In 2009, the panel said women  should delay their first Pap smear until they turn 21, and be screened less frequently than they had in the past. That same year, the panel recommended women  start routine mammograms at 50 rather than at 40, and have them every other year, instead of annually.
title: 美国专家小组称，结肠癌筛查应该在45岁时更早开始
title_en: Colon Cancer Screening Should Start Earlier, at Age 45, U.S. Panel Says

需要澄清的是，首席执行官亚历克斯·陶布告诉我，他并不是想要取代LinkedIn--他承认，由于网络效应，“如果你想要关闭LinkedIn，你是无法做到的。”
相反，我们的目标是创造一些满足不同需求的东西。LinkedIn主要作为在线简历和关系网工作，而Upstream的目标是帮助用户建立对他们的职业生涯很重要的人脉和人际关系--这在大规模聚会和会议并不是真的可能的时候是非常需要的(尽管我们肯定在TechCrunch上尝试创建虚拟的等价物)。
Upstream的第一个产品专注于专业团体和社区，允许用户发布公司所谓的专业要求，比如他们是否想要招聘某个职位的人，或者需要在另一家公司进行介绍。
陶布表示，Upstream的下一款产品Upstream Events真正实现了这一点，Upstream将主持一位嘉宾演讲者，然后与会者与活动中的其他人进行5分钟的一对一视频聊天。
Upstream表示，它已经举办了100多场活动，参加一场活动的人中有72%随后会参加另一场活动。
虽然团队已经构建了多个产品(我们已经介绍了其中的一些)，但他们今天正在勾勒出更广阔的愿景，同时推出一些新功能。
首先，虽然社区以前是通过私有的、未列出的链接共享的，但现在您可以在Discovery部分浏览所有不同的社区。与此同时，社区组织者仍然可以通过批准或拒绝新成员来控制谁加入了社区。
还有一个叫做办公时间的新活动，允许用户留出结构化的时间，与任何有兴趣与他们交谈的人进行虚拟的一对一会谈。这些会话可以公开列出，也可以不列出，这样您就只能通过电子邮件或在某个社区内共享它们。
在一篇博客文章中，陶布指出，他通过Ohours.org认识了他的SocialRank/Upstream联合创始人兼首席技术官迈克尔·申菲尔德，他们正试图在这里复制这种经历：
假设您是一家大公司的首席营销官，您想让您的员工有机会1：1会面。使用您的Outlook日历和电子邮件协调10分钟的个人日程安排的想法并不吸引人。但是使用Upstream，您可以选择您想要提供的30分钟块，以及您希望会话的时间长度。你决定在今年剩下的时间里每隔一个周五美国东部时间下午2点上班。活动已构建，并且可以无缝共享给您选择向其提供办公时间的任何人。
事实上，Taub的帖子列出了30多个已经在Upstream上提供办公时间的人，包括“纽约时报”记者泰勒·洛伦茨、Foursquare联合创始人/Expa合伙人Naveen Selvadurai和亚马逊图片产品主管Nate Wesiemer。
上游还宣布，它已经从8-bit Capital、Human Ventures、BaseFund、NYVP和各种天使投资者那里筹集了一笔数额不详的预种子资金。
展望未来，Taub表示，下一个最重要的任务是推出Upstream的网络版(目前可以通过移动应用程序获得)，并继续构建实时体验、异步体验和提供真正实用的功能。
他写道：“我们设想的未来是，专业人士来到上游参加活动或询问，并留下来寻找令人信服的机会，使上游成为他们充满活力和有益的体验。”
note_en:
To be clear, CEO Alex Taub told me that he’s not trying to replace LinkedIn — he acknowledged that thanks to network effects,”If you want to go and try to take down LinkedIn, you’re not going to be able to take them down.”
 Instead, the goal is to create something that fulfills a different need. Where LinkedIn works primarily as an online résumé and rolodex,  Upstream   aims to help users build the connections and relationships that are important to their careers — something that’s sorely needed at a time when large-scale meetups and conferences aren’t really possible (though we’re certainly trying to create the virtual equivalent  at TechCrunch).
   Upstream’s first product focused on professional groups and communities, allowing users to post what the company called Professional Asks, like if they’re looking to hire someone for a certain position or need an introduction at another company.
 Taub suggested that things really took off with Upstream’s next product, Upstream Events, where Upstream would host a guest speaker, then attendees were matched up for five-minute, one-on-one video chats with the other people at the event.
  Upstream says it’s already hosted more than 100 events, with 72% of people who who attend one event subsequently attending another.
 While the team has built multiple products (and  we’ve covered some of them already), they’re outlining the broader vision today and launching some new features at the same time.
 For one thing, while communities were previously shared via a private, unlisted link, you can now browse all the different communities in a Discovery section. At the same time, community organizers will be still be able to control who joins by approving or rejecting new members.
 There’s also a new spin on Events called Office Hours, allowing users to set aside structured time for virtual one-on-one sessions with anyone who’s interested in speaking to them. These sessions can be listed publicly, or they can be unlisted, so that you only share them via email or within a certain community.
  In  a blog post, Taub noted that he met his SocialRank/Upstream co-founder and CTO Michael Schonfeld via Ohours.org, and they’re trying to replicate that experience here:
 Let’s say you are the CMO of a large company and you want to give your people the opportunity to meet 1:1. The thought of coordinating the individual scheduling of ten minute blocks using your Outlook calendar and email is not attractive. But with Upstream, you are able to choose the 30min block you want to offer and how long you want the sessions to be. You decide you want to run your office hours every other Friday at 2pm ET for the rest of the year. The event is built and able to be shared seamlessly to whoever you choose to offer the Office Hours to.
 In fact, Taub’s post lists more than 30 different people who are already offering office hours on Upstream, including New York Times reporter  Taylor Lorenz, Foursquare co-founder/Expa partner  Naveen Selvadurai and Amazon Photo Head of Product  Nate Westheiemer.
 Upstream is also announcing that it has raised an undisclosed amount of pre-seed funding from 8-Bit Capital, Human Ventures, Basement Fund, NYVP and various angel investors.
 Looking ahead, Taub said that the next big priority is launching a web version of Upstream (which is currently available via mobile app), and to continue building live experiences, asynchronous experiences and features that provide real utility.
 “We imagine a future when professionals come to Upstream for an event or Ask, and stay for the compelling opportunities that make Upstream an energizing and beneficial experience for them,” he wrote.
title: 上游的目标是成为您职业社交生活的新家。
title_en: Upstream aims to be the new home for your professional social life

note:
对于智能家居大赛来说，这是忙碌的几周。亚马逊(Amazon)、谷歌(Google)和苹果(Apple)都发布了新的智能扬声器，目的之一是巩固它们各自在用户联网家庭中心的地位。
除了推出一系列新的Echo设备外，亚马逊还在改进其以廉价著称的Fire平板电脑的功能。今天，该公司将推出一项免费软件更新，以选择带智能家居设备仪表盘的石板。该系统本质上是支持Alexa的联网设备的一站式商店。
它类似于谷歌和苹果通过各自的Home应用程序提供的各种控制中心，可以访问智能灯、插头、相机、恒温器等，应有尽有。在Echo Show设备上也可以找到类似的功能。Fire平板电脑提供了一种相当便宜的方式来实现这一功能(未来Fire TV也可能如此)。当然，亚马逊也在努力改进这些设备上的Alexa功能，实质上是让它们成为廉价智能显示屏的两倍。
然而，也许最大的谜团是在新的Echo上增加了智能家居集线器功能。这一事实被报道得有点少(毕竟，亚马逊在之前的Echo Plus机型中开始添加这一功能)，但为这款99美元的设备添加ZigBee功能应该会在一定程度上降低进入门槛。
note_en:
It’s been a busy few weeks for the smart home race.  Amazon,   Google and Apple have all announced new smart speakers aimed at — among other things — cementing their respective positions at the center of users’ connected households.
 Adding onto the introduction of a whole bunch of new  Echo   devices, Amazon is also improving what its famously inexpensive Fire Tablets can do. Today the company will be rolling out a free software update to select slates that brings a smart home device dashboard. The system essentially serves as a one-stop shop for connected devices that work with Alexa.
  It’s similar to the sorts of control centers Google and Apple offer with their respective Home apps, with access to things like smart lights, plugs, cameras, thermostats, you name it. Similar functionality can also be found on the Echo Show devices. Fire tablets offer a pretty cheap way in to that functionality (so, too, might Fire TVs, going forward). And, of course, Amazon has also made efforts to improve Alexa functionality on the devices, essentially letting them double as inexpensive smart displays.
 Perhaps the biggest piece of the puzzle, however, is the addition of smart home hub functionality on the new Echo. The fact was a bit under reported (Amazon, after all, started adding this functionality with previous Echo Plus models), but adding zigbee functionality for the $99 device should go a ways toward lowering that barrier of entry.
title: 亚马逊增加设备仪表盘，努力使Fire平板电脑成为智能家居控制中心
title_en: Amazon adds device dashboard in bid to make Fire tablets a smart home control center

note:
正如联合创始人兼首席执行官文卡特·文卡塔拉马尼(Venkat Venkataramani)在2018年首轮比赛时告诉我的那样，让数据准备好使用需要大量的人工工作，这是获得真正洞察力的障碍。他希望用Rockset来改变这一点。
我们正在用创新的架构和独特的功能来构建我们的服务，这些功能可以直接在原始数据上实现全功能的FAST SQL。我们把这个作为一项服务来提供。因此，开发人员和数据科学家可以在几分钟内从任何形式、任何形式的有用数据转变为有用的应用程序。今天需要几个月的时间，“他在2018年告诉我。
事实上，“Rockset自动在任何数据上建立一个聚合索引--包括结构化、半结构化、地理和时间序列数据--用于大规模的高性能搜索和分析，”该公司解释说。
这似乎引起了投资者和客户的共鸣，因为该公司筹集了健康的B轮融资，业务正在蓬勃发展。Rockset提供了一些指标来说明这一点。首先，上个季度的收入增长了290%。虽然他们没有为这一百分比增长提供任何基础数据，但这显然是相当可观的。
此外，这家初创公司报告称增加了数百名新用户，同样没有确定任何具体数字，该平台上的查询量增长了313%。如果没有具体细节，很难知道这意味着什么，但对于处于早期阶段的初创公司来说，这似乎是健康的增长，特别是在当前的经济形势下。
红杉资本(Sequoia)合伙人迈克·弗纳尔(Mike Veronal)认为，一家公司帮助数据工作的速度比其他解决方案更快，因为其他解决方案首先需要大量处理。Rockset凭借其创新的数据索引新方法，迅速成为云中实时分析的真正领导者。弗纳尔在一份声明中表示：“我很高兴能与该公司合作，共同度过下一阶段的增长。”
该公司由RocksDB的创建者于2016年创立。这家初创公司此前在成立公司时筹集了300万美元的种子轮，并在2018年筹集了1850万美元的A轮。
note_en:
As co-founder and CEO Venkat Venkataramani told me  at the time of the Series A in 2018, there is a lot of manual work involved in getting data ready to use and it acts as a roadblock to getting to real insight. He hoped to change that with Rockset.
 “We’re building out our service with innovative architecture and unique capabilities that allows full-featured fast SQL directly on raw data. And we’re offering this as a service. So developers and data scientists can go from useful data in any shape, any form to useful applications in a matter of minutes. And it would take months today,” he told me in 2018.
  In fact, “ Rockset   automatically builds a converged index on any data — including structured, semi-structured, geographical and time series data — for high-performance search and analytics at scale,” the company explained.
 It seems to be resonating with investors and customers alike as the company raised a healthy B round and business is booming. Rockset supplied a few metrics to illustrate this. For starters, revenue grew 290% in the last quarter. While they didn’t provide any foundational numbers for that percentage growth, it is obviously substantial.
  In addition, the startup reports adding hundreds of new users, again not nailing down any specific numbers, and queries on the platform are up 313%. Without specifics, it’s hard to know what that means, but that seems like healthy growth for an early stage startup, especially in this economy.
 Mike Vernal, a partner at Sequoia, sees a company helping to get data to work faster than other solutions, which require a lot of handling first. “Rockset, with its innovative new approach to indexing data, has quickly emerged as a true leader for real-time analytics in the cloud. I’m thrilled to partner with the company through its next phase of growth,” Vernal said in a statement.
 The company was founded in 2016 by the creators of RocksDB. The startup had previously raised a $3 million seed round when they launched the company and the $18.5 million A round in 2018.
title: Rockset宣布投资4000万美元B系列，数据分析解决方案势头强劲
title_en: Rockset announces $40M Series B as data analytics solution gains momentum

note:
总部位于洛杉矶的运营和安全管理软件服务公司Replicate已经筹集了2500万美元，以增加人员配备，扩大销售和营销努力。
这笔融资由Two Sigma Ventures牵头，包括Plexo Capital、Amplify和Boldstart等现有投资者，对该公司的估值超过1亿美元。
Repliced最初是一家为Docker集装箱开发工具提供软件安全和管理服务的开发商，但随着市场转向Kubernetes，该公司转向为这些应用程序提供服务。
去年，该公司推出了管理Kubernetes部署的工具，并立即看到销售额增加。
“新的发行改变了公司的方向，增加了速度和客户，市场对此反应良好，”复制的首席执行官格兰特·米勒(Grant Miller)说。“一旦我们开始在这一成功的基础上再接再厉..。我们请来了UIPath，Puppet，他创造了软件自动化产品Tripwire，然后是FlatFile和Fishtown Analytics等很酷的新兴软件公司。
Repliced现在拥有85名客户，他们为访问该平台以及客户通过该平台开发的每个内部部署付费。“如果你是一家像木偶这样的公司，你就有数百名内部客户。”
该公司已经在招聘关键的高管，包括一名首席产品官、一名首席营收官以及负责营销和销售的副总裁。其中一部分资金将用于支持Replicated的持续招聘，另一大部分资金将用于产品开发。
米勒说：“我们正在自动化许多需要IT管理员将手放在键盘上来调整和优化的手动软件过程。”通过复制，一半的服务用于软件供应商管理发布和许可的工具，另一半用于IT管理员。这是关于他们如何自动化应用程序集成的问题。“。
米勒说，该公司目前有28名员工，预计到2021年底将增长到75名员工。
米勒在一份声明中说：“本地软件市场比SaaS市场大四倍。”复制使软件销售商能够以更低的工程费用和更快的上市时间释放本地软件类别的机会。这是云原生计算和Kubernetes的融合使这一市场变革成为可能。“
note_en:
The Los Angeles-based operations and security management software service, Replicated has raised $25 million to ramp up its staffing and scale its sales and marketing efforts.
 The funding, which was led by  Two Sigma Ventures   and included existing investors like Plexo Capital, Amplify, and BoldStart values the company at over $100 million.
 Replicated began as a developer of software security and management services for Docker containerized development tools, but as the market shifted to Kubernetes,  the company shifted to service those applications.
   Last year, the company unveiled its tools for managing Kubernetes deployments and immediately saw sales increase.
 “That new offering changed the direction of the company and added velocity and customers and the market responded so well to it,” said Replicated chief executive, Grant Miller. “Once we started building on that success.. We brought on UIPath, Puppet, who created the software automation stuff, TripWire, and then these cool emerging software companies like FlatFile and Fishtown Analytics.”
 Replicated now counts 85 customers who pay for access to the platform and for every on-premise deployment that customers develop through the platform. “If you are a company like Puppet, you have hundreds of on-premise customers.”
 The company has already been staffing up with key c-suite hires including a chief product officer, a chief revenue officer and vice presidents of marketing and sales. Some of the money will support Replicated’s continued hiring push, while another chunk will go into product development.
 “We’re automating as much of the manual software processes that require IT admins to put their hands on keyboards to adjust and optimize things,” said Miller. “With Replicated, half of the services are for tooling for the software vendor to manage release and licensing and the other half is for the IT admin. It’s about how they automate the integration of the applications.”
 The company, which currently has 28 employees expects to grow to 75 staff members by the end of 2021, Miller said.
 “The on-prem software market is four times larger than the SaaS market,” Miller said in a statement. “Replicated lets software vendors unlock the opportunity of the on-prem software category with lower engineering overhead and faster time to market. This is a market change made possible by the convergence of cloud native computing and Kubernetes.”
title: 洛杉矶在筹集2500万美元后，希望增加运营管理软件的研发和招聘
title_en: LA’s Replicated looks to increase R&D and hiring for its operations management software after raising $25 million

note:
主干一控制器就是其中一种情况。这是一款iPhone游戏控制器，具有圆滑的人体工程学、坚实的按钮手感、灵敏的模拟触发器和出色的构建质量。但Backone One的特别之处在于它附带的配套应用程序和服务，并启用了一个真正智能的软件层，可以跨应用程序多人玩、游戏录制、精彩编辑和快速交换。
来自Ideo和Astro Studios的设计师帮助实现了主心骨和制作过像Xbox360控制器这样的设备的人的血统，在这里真正展示了这一点。宽阔的L1/R1按钮使您可以轻松地在移动设备上轻触。模拟L2/R2触发器感觉很深但很紧。最新的Lightning连接器标准意味着控制信号的延迟极低。
控制器在紧凑的状态下大约有7“长，并使用了一个巧妙的滑动机构来向外扩展到10”大小。它很容易适合苹果“Plus”大小的手机，当你使用其中一款时，感觉就像是我第一次记得的完全开启的游戏机。
在内部边缘有声学隧道勺子，将声音从电话扬声器向前引导，幕后正在进行工作，以抵消主干按钮发出的特定声音，这样你在玩游戏时就听不到这些声音了。
套用圣经的一句话，没有软件的硬件是死的。主心骨是真的，真的活着。
骨干网的背后是骨干网本身，它是一款“同伴应用”，但实际上是一款直播游戏服务。它集成了跨游戏语音聊天、游戏切换、派对和朋友列表。它可以让你在朋友在线的时候收到推送通知，只需轻轻一点，就可以和他们一起滑入游戏。它非常光滑，感觉就像你能做的不是第一派对感觉的东西一样。
骨干网是由马尼特·海拉于2018年夏天创立的，当时他在YouTube实习，并在哥伦比亚大学结束了工作。
海拉指出，手机游戏中最大的问题之一是，当跳到游戏中和朋友一起玩时，会有大量的激活能量。主要的游戏有：使命召唤，堡垒之夜(最终，再次)，绝地求生-但最后一英里的问题是主要的。
海拉指出，虽然iPhone上有很多顶级游戏的例子，但在Twitch或YouTube上可以观看的这些平台上创建的内容只有一个沙漠。他将其比作滞后--滞后于其原因造成的结果。有如此多的手机游戏玩家，应该有大量的手机内容被分享，但由于这样做的机制如此之差，如此低劣，我们几乎什么都没有。
内容创作。捕捉亮点、剪辑和镜头并将其共享到您的首选平台必须简单且无缝。
和朋友一起玩必须是瞬间的。Backbone使用朋友何时开始玩任何游戏的通知，你可以从一个中央朋友列表中这样做。
因为Backbone是一个支持应用程序，所以它获得了一系列通常不会授予“常规”类应用程序的特殊权限。Backbone One在连接时总是打开的，这意味着无论你使用什么应用程序或使用多长时间，该应用程序都可以做任何它需要做的事情。这很重要，因为它使控制器上的主干按钮可以将游戏添加到你的仪表板上，轻松地在它们之间切换，并让你获得主干中包含的朋友列表。
将主干连接到手机上并开始在多人游戏中玩游戏的秒表时间是以秒为单位的，而不是以分钟为单位的。这正是您在移动环境中所需要的。
它还可以随时录制本地存储在您设备上的剪辑和亮点，但可以以1080p/30fps HEVC的速度上传到任何地方。当你在游戏中时，你只需按下捕捉按钮就可以开始录制，然后点击它就可以截图了。主干应用程序也有一些ML工作正在进行，以识别值得突出的剪辑并自动标记它们。你也可以在玩的时候自己给它们加标签。
而且主干耳机比(过去)装在iPhone盒子里的破旧耳塞耗电更少。您不会注意到配件本身的任何主要功耗。
如果Backbone能够设法与一两家大公司建立合作伙伴关系，拥有一个内置的控制方案，利用适当的死区和时机，这可能是手机游戏的一个真正的分水岭时刻。
但目前，它适用于大多数开箱即用的支持控制器的游戏。任何游戏都不需要做任何特殊的事情来利用大多数主干功能。这基本上增加了一层游戏间的社交和剪辑共享。
它集游戏中心、Twitch、PSN和Xbox Live的所有基本功能于一身-但在iPhone上。当然，Backbone One在Xbox和PlayStation远程播放应用程序上也运行得很好。
有时，一份投资者名单可以告诉你，一家公司对获得合适的资金有多认真。对于一家建立游戏服务和外围硬件的公司来说，Backbone没有比这更可靠的专栏了。Backbone得到了Mr Beast、Preston、Kwebbelkop、Typical Gamer、Night Media、Nadeshot和Ludlow Ventures的支持，以及Ashton Kutcher和Guy Oseary的Sound Ventures。这几乎就是我希望看到的一家认真关注社交和手机游戏的公司的个人资料。
在很多方面，Backbone感觉像是OpenFeint的精神继承者。如果你不熟悉，OpenFeint是第一个现代手机游戏网络。它是在iPhone应用商店之后的一年推出的，是一款名为Aurora Feint的游戏的一部分。它支持多人游戏、记分板和消息传递。OpenFeint的创始人？杰森·西特隆。Jason目前的初创公司，也与OpenFeint分享了很多精神包袱？不和谐。
OpenFeint在当时的重要性怎么说都不为过。随着应用生态系统的出现，很明显，游戏将是iPhone成功的重要因素，这是第一个允许人们利用首批手机之一拥有持久、高质量(或者说)互联网连接的跨游戏网络。苹果推出了游戏中心，作为对这一需求的基本回应，但从那以后，它再也没有投入过任何真正的投资。Backbone是如此之好，以至于我实际上可以看到苹果拿出了回购，并指派了工程人才来让它再次正常工作。这个想法的时机已经到了，而骨干的执行在这里是如此的一流，这使得这个案件既可以打开又可以关闭。
我已经用各种游戏测试这个控制器好几个星期了。我和海拉玩了一场“使命召唤战争地带”的快速比赛，尽管我们没有获得配音，但它比使用触控运行的可玩性要强得多。在我第一次参加Cod游戏时，我在Cod Mobile上玩了一款28杀游戏，尽管我被放在了一个优先考虑控制器用户的大厅里，但其他玩家每个人都有5个杀。虽然你现在可以将控制台控制器与iPhone配对，但主干比市场上任何其他集成控制器都要好得多，以至于它很快就会成为任何真正想要具有竞争力的移动玩家的必备品。我花在苹果移动硬件和创造它的人身上的时间可能和这个星球上的任何人一样多，所以请理解，我这么说不是轻率的，但这真的感觉像是如果苹果理解竞技游戏，它就会制作游戏控制器和网络。
Backbone One控制器售价99美元，现在可以通过免费的Backbone应用程序购买。
note_en:
The Backbone One controller is one of those situations. It’s a game controller for iPhones that has slick ergonomics, solid button feel, sensitive analog triggers and great build quality. But what makes Backbone One special is the companion app and service that ships with it and enables a truly clever software layer enabling cross-app multiplayer, game recording, highlight editing and quick swap.
 Designers from Ideo and Astro Studios helped realize Backbone and the pedigree of people who have crafted devices like the Xbox 360 controller really show here. Wide L1/R1 buttons make it easy to tap on mobile. Analog L2/R2 triggers feel deep but tight. The latest Lightning connector standard means extremely low latency for control signals.
  The controller is around 7” long in its compact state and uses a clever sliding mechanism to expand outwards to up to 10” in size. It easily fits Apple’s “Plus” sized phones and when you’re using one of those it feels like a full on game console for the first time I can remember.
 There are acoustic tunneling scoops at the inside edges that direct sound forward from the phone speakers and there is work being done behind the scenes to cancel out the specific sounds the Backbone One’s buttons make so that you don’t hear those while you’re playing.
  To co-opt a biblical phrase, hardware without software is dead. And the Backbone One is really, really alive.
 Behind the Backbone One is Backbone itself, which is a ‘companion app’ but is really a live gaming service. It has integrated cross-game voice chat, game switching, parties and a friends list. It lets you get push notifications when your friends are on and slide right into a game with them with a single tap. It’s remarkably slick and feels as first-party as you could make something that is literally not first-party feel.
 Backbone was founded by Maneet Khaira in the summer of 2018 while interning at YouTube and wrapping up at Columbia.
 Khaira notes that one of the biggest issues in mobile gaming is that there is a ton of activation energy when it comes to jumping in and playing with friends. The major games are there: Call of Duty, Fortnite (eventually, again), PUBG — but the last mile issue is major.
  Khaira points out that while there are plenty of examples of top-tier gaming titles on iPhone, there is just a desert of content created on these platforms available to watch on Twitch or YouTube. He likens it to a hysteresis — a lagging behind of an effect from its cause. There are   so many  mobile gamers that there should be a   ton  of mobile content shared, but because the mechanisms to do so have been so poor and so under-crafted, we have next to nothing.
   Content creation. It had to be easy and seamless to capture highlights, clips and footage and share them to your preferred platform.
 Playing with friends has to be instantaneous. Backbone uses notifications about when friends start playing across any game and you can do so from one central friends list.
 Because Backbone is a support app, it gets a bunch of special privileges that would normally not be granted to a ‘regular’ class of app. Backbone One is always on while it’s attached, which means that the app can do whatever it needs to do no matter what app you’re in or for how long. This is huge because it enables the Backbone button on the controller to add games to your dashboard, swap easily between them and lets you get at your friends list contained in Backbone.
 The stopwatch time for attaching the Backbone One to your phone and beginning to play a game in multiplayer is measured in seconds, not minutes. It’s exactly what you need in the mobile context.
  It also enables any-time recording of clips and highlights that store locally on your device but can be uploaded anywhere at 1080p/30fps HEVC. When you’re in game you can just smash the Capture button to start recording and tap it to screenshot. The Backbone app also has some ML work going on to identify highlight-worthy clips and mark them automatically. You can also tag them yourself while you play.
 And Backbone One does this on less power than the crap earbuds that (used to) come in an iPhone box. You won’t notice any major power drain from the accessory itself.
 If Backbone can manage to get a partnership with one or two majors to have a built-in control scheme that takes advantage of the proper dead zones and timing it could be a real watershed moment for mobile gaming.
 But right now it works with   most  games that have controller support right out of the box. No game needs to do anything special to take advantage of the majority of Backbone features. This basically adds on a layer of inter-game social and clip sharing.
 It’s all of the basic features of Game Center, Twitch, PSN and Xbox Live rolled into one — but on iPhone. And, of course, the BackBone one works just fine with Xbox and PlayStation remote play apps.
  Sometimes a list of investors can tell you a lot about how serious a company is about getting the right kind of money. For a company building a gaming service and peripheral hardware, Backbone couldn’t have a more solid column. Backbone is backed by MrBeast, Preston, Kwebbelkop, Typical Gamer, Night Media, Nadeshot, and Ludlow Ventures, as well as Ashton Kutcher and Guy Oseary’s Sound Ventures. Pretty much exactly the profile I would want to see for a company serious about social and mobile gaming.
 In many ways, Backbone feels like a spiritual successor to  OpenFeint. If you’re not familiar, OpenFeint was the first modern mobile gaming network. It launched the year after the iPhone App Store and was part of a game called Aurora Feint. It enabled multiplayer, scoreboards and messaging. The founder of OpenFeint? Jason Citron. Jason’s current startup, that also shares a lot of spiritual luggage with OpenFeint? Discord.
 It’s hard to overstate how important OpenFeint was at the time. As the app ecosystem was emerging it was clear that games would be a big part of what made the iPhone successful and this was the first cross-game network that allowed people to take advantage of one of the first phones to have a persistent, high-quality (ish) internet connection. Apple launched Game Center as a basic response to this need but it has never put any real investment behind it since. Backbone is so good that I could actually see Apple hauling out the repo and assigning engineering talent to get it working well again. The time has come for this idea and Backbone’s execution is so top notch here that it makes the case open and shut.
  I’ve been testing the controller for a few weeks now with a variety of games. I played a quick match of Call of Duty Warzone with Khaira and even though we didn’t secure the dub it was massively more playable than running with touch controls. My very first session of CoD I had a 28 kill game in cod mobile and, even though I was put into a lobby that prioritizes controller users the other players had like 5 kills each. Though you can now pair console controllers to iPhone, the Backbone is so much better than any of the other integrated controllers on the market that it will quickly become a must have for any mobile player that actually wants to be competitive. I have spent as much time with Apple mobile hardware and the people that have created it as probably anyone on the planet so please understand that I don’t say this lightly but this really feels like the game controller and network Apple would have made if it understood competitive games.
 The Backbone One controller runs $99 and can be   purchased via the free Backbone app today .
title: 在Beast先生和Nadesshoe的支持下，Backbone One终于可以破解手机游戏了
title_en: Backed by Mr. Beast and Nadeshot, Backbone One could finally crack mobile gaming

note:
谷歌知道很多人会使用YouTube来跟上11月3日的美国大选。许多政客利用这个平台与选民沟通，一些新闻机构可能会全天候直播报道。不过，跟上选举日可能很困难，所以YouTube正在准备一个小型但有用的信息面板，它将出现在搜索结果和以选举为中心的视频的顶部。它将提醒用户“结果可能不是最终的”，并使用一个巨大的“显示我”按钮，将他们指向一个由谷歌运营的选举中心。
这已经不是YouTube第一次使用这一功能了。早在2019年3月，谷歌旗下的业务就添加了一个警报，该警报与有争议的搜索查询一起出现。例如，如果有人输入了“扑热息痛中的病毒”，YouTube就会抛出一张小卡片，上面详细说明了这场骗局，更重要的是，还会抛出昆特等事实核查合作伙伴的可信评估。它最初在印度推出，但后来扩展到包括美国在内的其他国家。上个月，YouTube还推出了一些与选举相关的问题旁边出现的面板-比如如何投票，以及如何在你所在的州登记投票-并链接到两党政策中心(Biparty Policy Center)智库等权威来源的信息。
在一篇博客文章中，YouTube解释了它将在选举日打击错误信息的许多其他方式。其中大多数并不新鲜-该公司致力于提升权威新闻来源并删除欺骗性内容已经有一段时间了-YouTube也不太可能完全杜绝错误信息。不过，很高兴知道该公司正在积极考虑并为11月3日做准备。
note_en:
Google knows that many people will be using YouTube to keep up with the US election on November 3rd. Many politicians use the platform to communicate with voters, and some news organizations will likely livestream round-the-clock coverage. Keeping up with Election Day can be difficult, though, so YouTube is preparing  a small but useful information panel that will appear at the top of search results and election-centric videos. It will remind users that “results may not be final” and, using a massive ‘SHOW ME’ button, point them toward a Google-run election hub.
 It’s not the first time that YouTube has used this feature. Back  in March 2019, the Google-owned operation added an alert that appeared alongside controversial search queries. If someone had typed ‘virus in paracetamol,’ for instance, YouTube would throw up a small card that details the hoax and, more importantly, a trustworthy assessment from a fact-checking partner such as The Quint. It was launched in India but has since expanded to other countries  including the US. Last month, YouTube also introduced some panels that appear alongside election-related queries — such as how to vote, and how to register to vote in your state — and link to information by authoritative sources such as the Bipartisan Policy Center think tank.
  In  a blog post, YouTube explained many of the other ways it will be fighting misinformation on Election Day. Most of them aren’t new — the company has been working to elevate authoritative news sources and remove deceptive content for some time now — and it’s unlikely that YouTube will be able to stamp out misinformation completely. Still, it’s nice to know the company is actively thinking about and preparing for November 3rd.
title: YouTube将警告用户选举日结果可能不是最终结果
title_en: YouTube Will Warn Users That Election Day Results 'May Not Be Final'

note:
由S.R.韦恩·陈博士领导的卡尔加里大学卡明医学院(CSM)的一个研究小组取得了一项令人兴奋的突破，有可能预防和逆转阿尔茨海默氏症的影响。
研究小组发现，在动物模型中，限制一种名为ryanodine受体的通道的开放时间可以逆转并防止阿尔茨海默病的进展，该通道的作用就像通往心脏和大脑中的细胞的门户。他们还确定了一种可以中断疾病进程的药物。
给动物模型用药的效果是显著的：经过一个月的治疗，这些模型中的记忆丧失和认知障碍消失了。
李斌心血管研究所和CSM霍奇基斯脑研究所的成员陈博士说：“确定一种临床使用的药物，作用于确定的目标，提供抗阿尔茨海默病的益处，其重要性怎么强调都不为过。”陈博士是陈的学生，姚金晶博士，是这项研究的第一作者。这项研究的第一作者是李斌心血管研究所和CSM霍奇基斯脑研究所的成员姚金晶博士。他的学生姚金晶博士是这项研究的第一作者。
这项开创性的研究结果最近发表在同行评议期刊“细胞报告”(Cell Reports)上。
这项工作可能影响很大，因为超过50万加拿大人患有阿尔茨海默氏症和其他痴呆症，遭受记忆力丧失和其他认知障碍，对生活质量产生负面影响。
之前的研究表明，阿尔茨海默病的进展是由蛋白质淀粉样蛋白(Aβ，Aβ)诱导神经元水平的过度活动的恶性循环推动的。然而，这背后的机制还没有完全理解，也没有有效的治疗方法来停止这个周期。
陈的团队使用了一种用于心脏病患者的现有药物卡维地洛的一部分，来治疗有阿尔茨海默氏症症状的小鼠模型。经过一个月的治疗，研究人员对动物模型进行了测试，结果非常有希望。
“我们治疗了他们一个月，效果相当惊人，”陈说，他解释说，这种药物成功地逆转了阿尔茨海默病的主要症状。“我们无法区分药物治疗的疾病模型和健康模型。”
被高度引用的Clarivate研究员陈对这项研究的未来持乐观态度，并指出下一步将是人体临床试验。
韦恩·陈(Wayne Chen)是CSM生理药理学、生物化学和分子生物学系的教授，由美国霍奇基斯脑研究所领导的大脑和心理健康研究所是指导卡尔加里大学实现其高眼界目标的六项研究战略之一。该战略为该大学的大脑和心理健康研究提供了一个统一的方向。
note_en:
A research team at the University of Calgary’s  Cumming School of Medicine (CSM) led by Dr. S.R. Wayne Chen, PhD, has made an exciting breakthrough with the potential to prevent and reverse the effects of Alzheimer’s disease.
  The team discovered that limiting the open time of a channel called the ryanodine receptor, which acts like a gateway to cells located in the heart and brain, reverses and prevents progression of Alzheimer’s disease in animal models. They also identified a drug that interrupts the disease process.
  The effect of giving the drug to animal models was remarkable: After one month of treatment, the memory loss and cognitive impairments in these models disappeared.
  “The significance of identifying a clinically used drug that acts on a defined target to provide anti-Alzheimer’s disease benefits can’t be overstated,” says Chen, a member of the  Libin Cardiovascular Institute and the  Hotchkiss Brain Institute at the CSM.     Dr. Jinjing Yao, PhD, a student of Chen, is the first author of the study.
  The results of this groundbreaking study were recently published in the peer-reviewed journal,   Cell Reports.
  This work is potentially highly impactful as more than half a million Canadians live with Alzheimer’s disease and other dementias, suffering memory loss and other cognitive impairments with a negative impact on quality of life.
    Previous research has shown that the progression of Alzheimer’s disease is driven by a vicious cycle of the protein amyloid β (Aβ) inducing hyperactivity at the neuron level. However, the mechanism behind this wasn’t fully understood nor were there effective treatments to stop the cycle.
  Chen’s team used a portion of an existing drug used for heart patients, carvedilol, to treat mice models with Alzheimer’s symptoms. After a month of treatment, researchers tested animal models with very promising results.
  “We treated them for a month and the effect was quite amazing,” says Chen, explaining the drug was successful in reversing major symptoms of Alzheimer’s disease. “We couldn’t tell the drug-treated disease models and the healthy models apart.”
  Chen, a Clarivate Highly Cited Researcher, is optimistic about the future of this research, noting the next step will be clinical trials in people.
  Wayne Chen is a professor in the Department of Physiology and Pharmacology, Biochemistry and   Molecular Biology at the CSM.       Led by the        Hotchkiss Brain Institute    ,        Brain and Mental Health     is one of six research strategies guiding the University of Calgary toward its Eyes High goals. The strategy provides a unifying direction for brain and mental health research at the university.
title: 研究小组发现具有逆转阿尔茨海默氏症潜力的突破
title_en: Research team discovers breakthrough with potential to reverse Alzheimer's

自动卡车运输将改善道路安全，并在整个物流行业提供更高的效率。在我们配置Waymo司机来操作Class 8卡车并释放这些优势时，我们很高兴地告诉大家，Waymo已经与全球大型商用车市场领先者戴姆勒卡车建立了广泛的全球战略合作伙伴关系。
我们最初的努力将把世界上最有经验的司机™与戴姆勒的Freightliner Cascadia结合起来，实现完全自动驾驶。这些配备了Waymo司机的全自动卡车将在未来几年向美国客户供应，我们将在不久的将来探索向其他地区和品牌扩张。我们期待着与戴姆勒合作，为车队客户实现提高道路安全和效率的共同目标。
Waymo首席执行官John Krafcik：“我们最尊重戴姆勒的工程技能和广泛的全球卡车产品组合，因此我们期待着与我们的新合作伙伴一起扩展Waymo Driver，以提高世界道路上的道路安全和物流效率。”戴姆勒卡车股份公司(Daimler Truck AG)董事会主席兼董事会成员马丁·道姆(Martin Daum)说：“作为我们行业的领导者，戴姆勒卡车是自动化卡车运输的先驱。近年来，我们在将系列生产的高度自动化卡车带上道路的全球路线图上取得了重大进展。随着我们与Waymo作为自动驾驶领域的领先者建立战略合作伙伴关系，我们朝着这一目标又迈出了重要的一步。这一伙伴关系补充了戴姆勒卡车公司的双重战略方法，即与两个强大的合作伙伴合作，向我们的客户提供与我们最好的卡车无缝集成的自动L4解决方案。“。戴姆勒卡车股份公司(Daimler Truck AG)董事会成员、戴姆勒卡车北美公司总裁兼首席执行官罗杰·尼尔森(Roger Nielsen)表示：“道路货运量的增加与车队运营商对高度自动化卡车的需求和愿景相结合，是我们不懈追求创新的动力。我们正在推动工程解决方案，这些解决方案首先致力于提高安全性，并帮助我们的客户提高业务效率。基于我们与Waymo的合作，我们将处于独特的地位，能够为我们的船队客户提供满足他们个人需求的最佳解决方案选择。“。欲了解更多信息，您可以在此处阅读联合新闻稿。
note_en:
Autonomous trucking is poised to improve road safety and offer greater efficiency across the logistics industry. As we configure the Waymo Driver to operate Class 8 trucks and unlock these benefits, we’re pleased to share that Waymo has entered a broad, global, strategic partnership with Daimler Trucks, the global market leader in large commercial vehicles.
  Our initial effort will combine The World’s Most Experienced Driver ™ with Daimler’s Freightliner Cascadia to enable fully autonomous driving. These fully autonomous trucks, equipped with the Waymo Driver, will be available to U.S. customers in the coming years, and we’ll explore expansion into other geographies and brands in the near future. We look forward to working with Daimler to achieve our common goal of improving road safety and efficiency for fleet customers.
 John Krafcik, Chief Executive Officer, Waymo: “We have the highest regard for Daimler’s engineering skills and broad global truck product portfolio, and so we look forward to scaling the Waymo Driver, together with our new partner, to improve road safety and logistics efficiency on the worlds’ roadways.”   Martin Daum, Chairman of the Board of Management of Daimler Truck AG and Member of the Board of Management of Daimler AG: “As leader of our industry, Daimler Trucks is the pioneer of automated trucking. In recent years, we have achieved significant progress on our global roadmap to bringing series-produced highly automated trucks to the road. With our strategic partnership with Waymo as the leader in autonomous driving, we are taking another important step towards that goal. This partnership complements Daimler Trucks’ dual strategy approach, of working with two strong partners to deliver autonomous L4 solutions that are seamlessly integrated with our best-in class trucks, to our customers.”    Roger Nielsen, Member of the Board of Management of Daimler Truck AG, President and CEO of Daimler Trucks North America: “The combination of increased road freight volumes and the need and vision of fleet operators for highly automated trucks, is what fuels our relentless pursuit of innovation. We are pushing engineering solutions that strive above all to increase safety and help our customers improve business efficiencies. Based on our collaboration with Waymo, we will be in the unique position to be able to provide our fleet customers with a choice among the best solutions for their individual requirements.”   For more information, you can read the joint press release  here.
title: Waymo和戴姆勒卡车合作开发全自动卡车
title_en: Waymo and Daimler Trucks partner on the development of fully autonomous trucks

IRCTC的火车票预订经验堪称传奇！虽然该网站多年来一直在改进，但有大量在线火车票预订应用程序的事实证明，IRCTC的基本体验可以更好。
也许这就是S Yuvarajaa的想法。S Yuvarajaa是一名IITian人，在为Android手机开发火车票务应用时，他从IIT Kharagpur毕业了。但现在它已经把应用程序的创建者送进了监狱。
据TOI报道，Tirupur土生土长的S Yuvarajaa开发了Super Tatkal Pro和Super Tatkal Pro火车票预订应用，他也因同样的原因被捕。
据报道，他被指控绕过了IRCTC的门票预订系统，创建了一个在线平台，让顾客通过基于硬币的系统预订门票以换取付款。
Yuvarajaa据信在2016年开发了这两款基于Android的在线售票应用，当时它们很受欢迎-但自那以后，这些应用已经从Google Play商店下架，无法下载。
根据TOI的报告，金奈铁路保护部队(RPF)的网络小组使用服务器源代码、应用程序源代码、最终用户列表和他的银行对账单追踪到了他。
此外，在描述这名年轻人被捕的过程中，南方铁路首席安全专员比兰德拉·库马尔(Birendra Kumar)表示，“他开发了一款软件，可以更快地订票，而他甚至不是IRCTC的授权代理人。”
绕过铁路系统和非法赚钱是犯罪行为，对Yuvarajaa的指控证实了这一点--RPF已根据“铁道法”第143(2)条(对未经授权从事购买和供应火车票业务的处罚)登记立案。
TOI报告援引一些铁路官员的话说，由于这种更快的在线订票应用，试图在IRCTC网站上订票的人被剥夺了公平的机会。
Yuvarajaa被捕后，一名自称是他朋友的Twitter用户在微博平台上发布了一条评论。
你对整个发展有什么看法？请在下面的评论区让我们知道...
note_en:
IRCTC's rail ticket booking experience is the stuff of legends! While the website has improved over the years, the fact that there's a host of online rail ticket booking apps out there proves the fundamental IRCTC experience can be much better.
 Maybe that was the idea in S Yuvarajaa's mind, an IITian who passed out of IIT Kharagpur, when he built his rail ticketing apps for Android phones. But it has now landed the app creator in jail.
   According to a TOI report, Tirupur native S Yuvarajaa who created the 'Super Tatkal' and 'Super Tatkal Pro' railway ticket booking apps has been arrested for the same.
 He's accused of bypassing the IRCTC's ticket booking system by creating an online platform for customers to book tickets in exchange for payments through a 'coin' based system, according to reports.
 Yuvarajaa is believed to have created both the Android-based online ticket booking apps in 2016, when they garnered popularity -- but the apps have since been removed from Google Play store and are unavailable for download.
 According to the TOI report, the Cyber Cell of Railway Protection Force (RPF) in Chennai tracked him down using server source code, application source code, end-users list and his bank statements.
   Furthermore, while describing the youth's arrest, the Southern Railway principal chief security commissioner Birendra Kumar said, “He created a software to book tickets faster and he was not even an authorised agent of IRCTC.”
 Bypassing the railway system and making money illegally was the crime, as is confirmed by the charges labelled against Yuvarajaa -- RPF has registered a case under section 143 (2) of the Railways Act (penalty for unauthorised carrying on of business of procuring and supplying of railway tickets).
 Because of this faster online ticket booking app(s), people trying to book tickets on IRCTC's website were deprived of a fair chance, according to some rail officials cited in the TOI report.
 After Yuvarajaa's arrest, a Twitter user claiming to be his friend has posted a thread of comments on the micro-blogging platform.
  What do you think about this whole development? Let us know in the comments section below...
title: IIT毕业生因创建更快的火车票预订应用而被捕
title_en: IIT Graduate Gets Arrested For Creating Faster Rail Ticket Booking App

西格勒的创业生涯始于2005年，在一家专注于科技客户的创业机构从事网络开发工作。他后来报道了VentureBeat和后来的TechCrunch的初创公司，然后成为CrunchFund的创始合伙人，然后最终加入GV(当时的谷歌风险投资公司)，专注于初创公司。除了上面列出的公司，西格勒还牵头投资了其他成功的早期公司，包括宇宙公司、Giphy公司、玩家论坛公司、CTRL-Labs公司和AltspaceVR公司。
在当前的全球大流行开始时，Siegler与我们自己的Lucas Matney聊了聊GV对移动网站创建者宇宙的投资，以及鉴于旅行和社交距离限制，管理投资组合的方式发生了怎样的变化。我们将从西格勒那里了解到，在接下来的几个月里，在新冠肺炎的背景下生活和工作，他的视角以及他正在与之合作和寻找潜在投资的早期公司发生了哪些变化。
更广泛地说，西格勒在早期创业和讲故事方面也有独特的视角和丰富的经验。作为一名记者，他的工作重点是关注新兴的技术公司，评估它们传达抱负的能力，它们正在解决的问题，以及它们正在建设的技术。他将这段经历带到了他对初创公司及其创始人投资潜力的评估中，以及他们讲述自己正在做的事情及其原因的好故事和令人信服的故事的能力。

note_en:
Siegler’s career in startups began in 2005, working in web development at a startup agency focused on tech clients. He later reported on startups at both VentureBeat and later TechCrunch, before becoming a founded partner at CrunchFund and then eventually joining GV (then Google Ventures) to focus on early-stage companies. In addition to the companies listed above, Siegler has led investments in other successful early-stage companies including Universe, Giphy, The Players’ Tribune, CTRL-Labs and AltspaceVR.
 At the outset of the current global pandemic, Siegler chatted with our own Lucas Matney about GV’s investment in mobile website-builder Universe and about how managing a portfolio changes in light of travel and social distancing restrictions. We’ll find out from Siegler what the ensuing months of living and working in the context of COVID-19 have changed about his perspective and about the early-stage companies he’s working with and scouting for potential investment.
 More broadly, Siegler also has a unique perspective and ample experience when it comes to early-stage startups and storytelling. His work as a journalist focused specifically on looking at new and emerging technology companies and assessing their ability to communicate their ambitions, the problems they’re solving and the technology they’re building. He brings that experience to his assessment of the investment potential of startups and their founders, and their ability to tell good and compelling stories about what they’re doing and why.
 All these topics, plus more questions from you, our audience. So join us if you’re an Extra Crunch member and get caught up on all the fintech goodness going on. And if you aren’t an Extra Crunch member, be  sure to check out subscription options before we get started.
